details.question: Write a summary of about 1000 to 1200 words. Only write about the plot and characters of the story.
details.reason: Agent预测摘要中的人物名称（如Rudolph/Tiberius, Wilfred Lillie, Mrs. Rudolph, Camden Lillie）与标准答案（如Graeme Rudolph, Susan Lorelei, Wilfred Lillie, Jeanne Della）完全不符，核心情节（婚姻延迟、证书错误、三角关系）完全缺失，属于主要人物错误和核心情节严重偏离。
